calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Continued To Sep-23-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class And Representative Action Complaint
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Sergio Julian Puche, Esq. 858-551-1223 Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik De Blouw LLP for Plaintiff.
Jennifer Ghassemi, Esq. 714-966-8824 Baker & Hostetler for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

The Court reads aloud the notice of contest email from Plaintiff's counsel, comments and poses questions. The Court gives an admonition.
Mr. Puche contests, presents arguments, directs the court's attention to Exhibit 1 and 2; will submit and amended motion and declaration.
Ms. Ghassemi has nothing to add.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GREGORY AUGUST AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF, ANN JUNG, MONTSERRAT ALON, MARTIN KAZINSKI, MARIA WALZ-SMITH, MOHAMMAD MAHYARI's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class And Representative Action Complaint.

Plaintiffs' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class And Representative Action Complaint is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
